nodes.label: AI as summarization and drafting tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or error-prone assistant
nodes.grounding_span: take large bodies of text or information and condense this down into key points or summaries

nodes.label: Human creative writing as personal expression
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated writing as impersonal or derivative
nodes.grounding_span: rewrite it in my own voice

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy in proofreading
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and errors in proofreading
nodes.grounding_span: the AI model kept making serious mistakes

nodes.label: AI as collaborative iterative partner
nodes.grounding_span: Collaboration. There's a lot of tweaking, going back and forth.

nodes.label: AI as tool to preserve human skill set
nodes.grounding_span: avoid leaning on it too heavily in order to avoid blunting my skill set

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: construct texts in my personal style

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative summarization tool
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to use AI when I need to take large bodies of text or information and condense this down into key points

nodes.label: Frustration with AI unreliability in proofreading
nodes.grounding_span: extremely frustrating, as the AI model kept making serious mistakes

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative writing
nodes.grounding_span: Anything truly creative, really. Otherwise, what's the point in me doing what I do?

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about future AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to keep using it as a tool, but will avoid leaning on it too heavily

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through prompt tweaking
nodes.grounding_span: I refine my prompt and go again. I'll keep doing this until I get closer to where I want to be.

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting for AI use
nodes.grounding_span: My other work as a commissioning editor feels safer, as this is interpersonal, so I will have to focus my attention more on that kind of work.
